title: Leland Inaba Oral History
creator: Tessaku
description: See this link for the most complete and recent information on this record: https://repository.californiarevealed.org/node/454967 .

Oral history with Leland Inaba, originally from Riverside, CA. Leland was born in Riverside and was a child when his mother and his twin brothers were sent north to Manzanar after EO 9066. His father was detained separately. Nearly 120,000 Japanese Americans were uprooted from their West Coast homes with the signing of Executive Order 9066 in February of 1942 and sent to inland concentration camps for four to five years.
